summary: Track I76 P1+P2+P3 substantive execution forward-charter status across operator ratification cycle per D-IH-76-P. Status flips: open (forward-charter active) -> in_progress (operator opens substantive-execution ratify batch) -> done (I76 P1 + P2 + P3 substantive deliverables shipped + I11 + I17 INITIATIVE_REGISTRY rows flipped to closed).
notes: Wave P Push 3 forward-charter tracker. Compressing the substantive execution into agent-only push window before operator ratification produces shallow work incompatible with v3.1 doctrine quality bar (precedent: D-IH-86-CJ Wave P kickoff forward-charter). RICE effort = 5 person-weeks: P1 = 2 person-weeks (5 mode SOPs + I17 absorption ledger); P2 = 1 person-week (MADEIRA_TOOL_RBAC.csv extension); P3 = 2 person-weeks (persistence + personality SOPs + I11 4 uncovered use-cases extension + I11 absorption ledger).

summary: Aggregate consolidation row for 53 pre-existing long-tail findings surfaced by Wave-P post-close inter-wave regression sweep. Breakdown: 10 DIM-02 forward-charter carryover (5 from INDEX_INTEGRITY_DISCIPLINE + 3 from INTER_WAVE_REGRESSION_DISCIPLINE + 1 each from DATAOPS + HOLISTIKA_QUALITY_FABRIC); 8 DIM-04 canonical-CSV pair-completeness (mostly supabase-mirror-migration); 8 DIM-05 SOP+runbook pairing (thi_data_* rows); 10 DIM-06 closed-initiative UAT class (INIT-02/07/10/15/17/18/22A/58/70/71); 8 DIM-09 cross-area breakthrough digest (PEOPLE_DESIGN_PATTERN_REGISTRY rows); 4 DIM-10 deploy-evidence (I66/I68/I71/I72); 5 DIM-11 cursor-rule skill-pairing (applied-research + brand-baseline-reality + conflict-surfacing + deploy-health + docs-config-sync). Wave R execution: dedicate ~3 person-days to triage these findings into either (a) rework-now individual fixes if root-cause is a single canonical/script/CSV
operator_runbook_path: OR (b) further forward-charter to per-discipline catch-up initiative. Cite per-dim findings in Wave R UAT report dimension-checklist.
last_review_at: Per akos-inter-wave-regression.mdc RULE 2: defer-OPS is the binding disposition for batches exceeding 10 findings when findings are pre-existing long-tail (not the closing wave's regressions). Wave R is the natural target because I82 + I76 + I81 closures are concentrated there; long-tail cleanup pairs with the closure-class UAT bar that re-sweeps DIM-02 through DIM-11.
